creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Gert Doering from comment #5)

Interesting; if you're not getting at least this message:

$ifname: possible hardware address duplication detected, disable IPv4

Then, AFAICT, this probably indicates that rtsold or nd6 has for some reason explicitly disabled it... I guess probably the former. CC'ing bz@ because I'm less sure now that it's specifically a tun/tap issue and not a broader issue.
